D:\SDK\LLVM\bin\clang.exe -nostartfiles -nostdlib -O0 -g -Xclang -gcodeview -D_DEBUG -D_DLL -D_MT -Xclang --dependent-lib=msvcrtd -Xlinker /subsystem:console -fuse-ld=lld-link @CMakeFiles\candlec.dir\objects1.rsp -o C:\Users\25654\Desktop\Candle\candlec.exe -Xlinker /MANIFEST:EMBED -Xlinker /implib:candlec.lib -Xlinker /pdb:C:\Users\25654\Desktop\Candle\candlec.pdb -Xlinker /version:0.0  @CMakeFiles\candlec.dir\linkLibs.rsp
